name: Pax Concentrate Insert Replacement Lid & O-Rings
summary: For optimal performance, the O-rings on the concentrate insert for the PAX 3 vaporiser should be replaced periodically.
description: For optimal performance, the O-rings on the concentrate insert for the PAX 3 vaporiser should be replaced periodically. This kit includes 5 O-rings and a replacement lid for the oven. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
